description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Make CI (MSYS2 for Windows) that runs on every push to all branches and on all pull requests to any branch. Use a windows-2022 job with a matrix strategy to build for multiple editions, compilers, targets, and architectures. Check out the repository, install required packages with pacman, and then run a PowerShell script to build the project using msys2_build.ps1 with matrix parameters.
